rooms.name: Grand Foyer
rooms.description: A dark hall with a cracked crystal chandelier dangling dangerously overhead. Cold air rushes through from outside.

items.name: Vintage Magnifying Glass
items.description: An old brass glass tool scratched near the frame rim.

rooms.name: The Crimson Lounge
rooms.description: Velvet highback seats rim around a dying fireplace hearth. The faint smell of expensive cigars hangs in the air.
rooms.vibe: Tense and thick with hidden secrets

items.name: Silver Carving Knife
items.description: The mansion's finest carving utensil, looking freshly wiped down.

rooms.name: Mansion Kitchen
rooms.description: A gleaming, industrial-grade prep facility. Copper pots line the overhead ceiling racks neatly.
rooms.vibe: Smelling faintly of rosemary and copper soap

items.name: Ornate Brass Key
items.description: A heavy key stamped with the master's private initials 'R.S.'

rooms.name: The Master's Study
rooms.description: Deep mahogany wood shelves stacked high with cryptic scientific ledgers and old historical maps.
rooms.vibe: Smelling of old paper, leather volumes, and spent oil lanterns

items.name: Altered Last Will
items.description: A legal draft completely cutting off the immediate family from any estate payouts.

rooms.name: The Glass Conservatory
rooms.description: An expansive botanical dome crowded with exotic, overgrown flora beneath fogged glass panels.
rooms.vibe: Stiflingly warm, humid, and heavy with greenhouse musk

items.name: Empty Aconite Vial
items.description: A small medical glass bottle hidden under a fern base, smelling of toxic wolfsbane.
